h n. P. Back Of
New Railway?

pages.raw_text:
A recent move made by the North
ern Pacific company looks very much
as II they have a deeper interest in
the building Of the new Occur d'Alene
& Spokane electric railway than has
been given out by them to the public.


During the past week they have
started work on the building of a
switch from their line on the east
of the city to where the electric line
Is making its grade. No Information
has been given out as to the object Of
this spur, but the public has been
led to believe that 1t is being put In
SO as to switch the equipment for
the new line when 1t arrives over the
Great Northern.


1t Is now stated that the Northern
Pacific officials have a hackers inter-
est in the enterprise. Notwithstanding
q denial by local men.
